name: Mastech Digital, Inc.
summary: Mastech Digital, Inc. is a provider of Digital Transformation IT Services headquartered near Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. The company offers data and analytics solutions, digital learning, and IT staffing services across two reportable segments: Data and Analytics Services and IT Staffing Services. With approximately 1,500 consultants, it serves mid-sized to large enterprises across multiple industry verticals, delivering data management, data engineering, customer experience consulting, cloud services, and staffing for both digital and mainstream technologies.

products.name: Data and Analytics Services
products.description: Consulting and managed services for data modernization, master data management, data governance, data integration, analytics, and customer experience solutions.

products.name: IT Staffing Services
products.description: Technical staffing for digital and mainstream technologies including data management, cloud, mobility, ERP, CRM, and e-Business solutions.

products.name: Digital Learning Services
products.description: Staffing and project-based services around digital learning, added via Hudson IT acquisition in 2015.

products.name: MAS-REMOTE
products.description: Remote staffing service offering launched in 2020 within the IT Staffing Services segment.

products.name: Offshore Staffing Services
products.description: Offshore staffing services provided to U.S.-based and local offshore clients, expanded in 2021.

products.name: Engineering Staffing Services
products.description: Recently added engineering staffing services to the company's portfolio of service offerings.

products.name: ServiceNow Practice
products.description: ServiceNow practice launched in 2024 along with increased focus on artificial intelligence-related technologies.

products.name: Data-in-Motion
products.description: Creates connected modern data systems with seamless data flow through agile engineering, trusted data, and streamlined integration.

products.name: Data-as-an-Asset
products.description: Data management solutions including MDM, Data Governance, Data Privacy, and Data Warehousing.

products.name: Data Activation
products.description: Unlocks insights for business decision-making through gap-to-goal roadmaps and advanced analytics.

partnerships.description: Partner/Alliance relationship providing pipeline of opportunities and new business opportunities in data and analytics.
